events.title: Annual Tech Symposium
events.description: A full-day symposium featuring student research, keynote speakers from the tech industry, and hands-on workshops. Open to all faculties.

events.title: Unilag Music Festival
events.description: An evening of live performances from student bands and special guest artists. Food vendors and merchandise stalls on site.

events.title: Inter-Faculty Football Final
events.description: The championship match of the inter-faculty league. Come support your faculty in this season decider.

events.title: Career Fair 2026
events.description: Meet recruiters from leading companies, attend CV clinics, and explore internship and graduate opportunities.

events.title: Cultural Heritage Day
events.description: A celebration of Nigeria's diverse cultures with traditional attire, music, and cuisine from across the regions.

events.title: Taste of Lagos Food Fair
events.description: Sample dishes from local vendors and student-run kitchens. A food lover's tour of Lagos flavours.

events.title: Startup Pitch Night
events.description: Student founders pitch their ventures to a panel of investors and mentors. Networking session to follow.

events.title: Drama Society Showcase
events.description: The Drama Society presents its end-of-semester production. An evening of original student theatre.

events.title: Basketball Championship
events.description: The final of the campus basketball tournament. Doors open an hour before tip-off.

events.title: Research Methods Workshop
events.description: A practical workshop on research design, data collection, and academic writing for final-year students.

events.title: Jazz & Poetry Evening
events.description: An intimate evening of live jazz and spoken-word poetry under the stars.

events.title: Campus Cook-off
events.description: Halls compete to be crowned the campus's best cooks. Tasting tickets available at the door.

events.title: AI & Robotics Expo
events.description: Demonstrations of student-built robots and AI projects, plus talks on the future of automation.

events.title: Freshers' Welcome Concert
events.description: Kick off the new session with live music, games, and giveaways. All new students welcome.

events.title: Marathon for Charity
events.description: A 10km run to raise funds for the student welfare endowment. Register your team in advance.

events.title: Alumni Networking Mixer
events.description: Connect with Unilag alumni across industries. Light refreshments and structured networking rounds.

events.title: Traditional Dance Competition
events.description: Troupes from each faculty perform traditional dances for the grand prize. A past-season highlight.

events.title: Street Food Carnival
events.description: A previous edition of the carnival bringing Lagos street-food culture to campus.
